item.title: AKBets: AK BETS @AKBets · 12min Betting Ring phenom @SimonNott confirmed for Wednesday & Thursday Cita AK BETS @AKBets · 13 a
item.description:
AK BETS @AKBets · 12min Betting Ring phenom @SimonNott confirmed for Wednesday & Thursday Cita AK BETS @AKBets · 13 abr. AK BETS @ PUNCHESTOWN Tue 28 Apr - Sat 02 May
For the first time ever the @AKBets Team will be working 4 pitches at this years Festival.
RAILS LINE - Number 1 FRONT LINE - Number 14 END LINE - Number 7 The New Trackside Pavillion
Bring on the Staffing crisis!
#AKBets 1 416

item.title: AKBets: AK BETS @AKBets · 16min En respuesta a @AKBets Laytown we have 5 pitches of the 28 and only 4 boards/joints. Forgot I
item.description:
AK BETS @AKBets · 16min En respuesta a @AKBets Laytown we have 5 pitches of the 28 and only 4 boards/joints. Forgot I bought a 5th one 2.5 years ago and haven’t used it!
Sligo real good pitch. We only work 4 of 9 days due to clashes. Suits a multi-pitcher/local.
Tramore can’t do all meetings / miss NYD as at Fairyhouse. 197
